statusLine.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const name=(j.model&&j.model.display_name)||'';const cw=j.context_window||{};const size=cw.context_window_size||0;const pctVal=cw.used_percentage;const usedK=pctVal!=null?Math.round(pctVal/100*size/1000):0;const sizeK=Math.round(size/1000);const pct=pctVal!=null?' ('+Math.round(pctVal)+'%)':'';process.stdout.write(name+' \u00b7 '+usedK+'K/'+sizeK+'K'+pct)}catch(e){}})"

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/apps/mobile" && npx prettier --write $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
